untranslatable_reason: This is a pair-trading strategy requiring cointegration analysis between two assets (GLD and GDX spread). The allowed indicator set does not include spread metrics, cointegration statistics, or cross-asset pair relationships. The signal requires calculation of GLD-GDX spread, mean reversion thresholds, and statistical cointegration tests which cannot be expressed using single-asset technical indicators. The exact lookback_period, threshold, half_life, and backtest parameters are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using zscore_20 on a single instrument as a generic mean reversion proxy, but this does NOT capture the true pair-trading logic. A proper implementation requires: (1) spread = GLD - GDX, (2) cointegration test, (3) z-score of spread vs historical mean, (4) entry on threshold breach, (5) exit on mean reversion. Recommend implementing as a custom pair-trading rule in the backtest engine rather than forcing into single-instrument indicators.
